name: LOVESICK | Jude Monet
description:
[MLM] 🖊️ | ❝You find out your classmate has been drawing you in secret.❞

⤷ As far as you know, you’re aware of every person that has a crush on you, whether that be a small or big amount. Until you’re not. 

You run into a complete stranger when leaving one of your classes, and when his things fall, so do little sketches of… you?
